# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  serverName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server
  databaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Administrator login name for the SQL Server
  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password for the SQL Server
  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
    metadata:
      description: SKU name for the database (Basic is cheapest at ~$5/month)
  skuTier:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
    metadata:
      description: SKU tier for the database
  maxSizeBytes:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2147483648
    metadata:
      description: Max size of the database in bytes (default 2GB)
  enableAzureADOnlyAuth:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Enable Azure AD only authentication

variables:
  serverResourceName: "[parameters('serverName')]"
  databaseResourceName: "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[variables('serverResourceName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
    tags:
      environment: startup-dev
      securityReviewDate: "[utcNow('yyyy-MM-dd')]"
      securityNote: Re-enable Advanced Threat Protection and auditing before production launch

  # NOTE: Connection security via TDE is enabled by default and costs nothing.
  # Transparent Data Encryption - enabled by default, no extra cost, DO NOT disable
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[format('{0}/current', variables('databaseResourceName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[variables('databaseResourceName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
      tier: "[parameters('skuTier')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local
    tags:
      environment: startup-dev

  # Firewall rule to allow Azure services (free, keeps internal connectivity secure)
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[format('{0}/AllowAzureServices', parameters('serverName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0

  # Short-term backup retention - 7 days is default and free
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[format('{0}/default', variables('databaseResourceName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    properties:
      retentionDays: 7
      diffBackupIntervalInHours: 24

  # TODO: Re-enable before handling real user data or going to production
  # Advanced Threat Protection - explicitly disabled per startup cost decision
  # - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/advancedThreatProtectionSettings
  #   apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
  #   name: "[format('{0}/Default', parameters('serverName'))]"
  #   dependsOn:
  #     - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
  #   properties:
  #     state: Enabled

  # TODO: Re-enable before handling real user data or going to production
  # Auditing - explicitly disabled per startup cost decision
  # - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
  #   apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
  #   name: "[format('{0}/default', parameters('serverName'))]"
  #   dependsOn:
  #     - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
  #   properties:
  #     state: Enabled
  #     retentionDays: 90
  #     isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

outputs:
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
  securityReminder:
    type: string
    value: "WARNING: Advanced Threat Protection and Auditing are DISABLED. Enable these before storing real user data or launching to production. TDE and TLS 1.2 remain enabled at no extra cost."
